No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links AI programming to poverty eradication or related targets.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances capacity in enabling technology (Target 17.8) by utilizing global AI models (ChatGPT) and platforms (Google Colab), fostering knowledge sharing and understanding international AI development (Target 17.6).
